task_completion.description: Verify the forensic case directory was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command (e.g., mkdir) or file manager showing the creation of the directory '/home/ga/Cases/USB_Triage_2024'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent analyzed the provided disk image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands (like fls, tsk_recover, file, or a script) or a forensic GUI tool actively processing '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd'.

task_completion.description: Verify the file type inventory contains the correct category headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '/home/ga/Reports/file_type_inventory.txt' open in a text editor or displayed in the terminal. It must contain the exact headers: '=== IMAGES ===', '=== DOCUMENTS ===', '=== EXECUTABLES ===', '=== ARCHIVES ===', and '=== OTHER ===' on their own lines.

task_completion.description: Verify the inventory file follows the required pipe-separated format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within 'file_type_inventory.txt', check that the file entries under the headers follow the format 'FILENAME|FULL_PATH|SIZE_BYTES|MIME_TYPE|IS_DELETED' (e.g., 'image.jpg|/img/image.jpg|1024|image/jpeg|NO').

task_completion.description: Verify the triage summary report was generated with the required fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '/home/ga/Reports/triage_summary.txt' open in an editor or terminal. It must contain the required lines such as 'CASE_NAME: USB_Triage_2024', 'CASE_NUMBER: INV-TRG-007', 'TOTAL_FILES', 'DELETED_FILES', and the category counts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually extracted and analyzed files rather than hallucinating the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check terminal history for commands that extract files from the image (e.g., tsk_recover) and check their MIME types (e.g., file --mime-type), or the use of a script that performs this analysis.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent replaced the placeholder <N> values in the summary with actual numbers.
integrity.visual_evidence: In 'triage_summary.txt', the fields like TOTAL_FILES, DELETED_FILES, and CATEGORY_IMAGES must have actual numeric values, not the literal string '<N>'.

integrity.description: Ensure the reports were saved to the correct paths and not just printed to stdout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for commands like 'nano', 'vim', 'echo ... >', or a script writing to '/home/ga/Reports/file_type_inventory.txt' and '/home/ga/Reports/triage_summary.txt'.
